name: AD Mixtape · Aquarium Drunkard Presents: Carolina Soul (Interview / Mixtape)
description: If you’re someone that's into records, especially soul records, you’ve probably heard of Carolina Soul. The Durham, NC based vinyl retailer has developed a cult following around its semi-weekly eBay auctions. Email blasts with subject lines like, “1,140+ Stellar Soul LPs” or “1,100+ Stupendous Jazz LPs,” lead to multi-day bidding wars over often extremely rare
